case_title: DIONISIO RODRIGUEZ ZUNIGA VS. AYMAN TALEB SHEHADEH

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZUNIGA, DIONISIO RODRIGUEZ AS TO DEFENDANT SHEHADEH, AYMAN TALEB EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF CYBELLE'S PIZZA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZUNIGA, DIONISIO RODRIGUEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEHADEH, AYMAN TALEB EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF CYBELLE'S PIZZA $24,799.33 PRINCIPAL, $492.49 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,661.82, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
